description: Social Media (Facebook, Twitter, Instagram etc.) has changed the way brands communicate with their consumers and vice versa. In this digital age, marketers and entrepreneurs can create competitive advantage for their brand by mastering the science and art of social media strategy. The goal is to understand how brands can leverage social for competitive advantage, consumer listening and innovation. Provides a strong theoretical foundation coupled with practical experience of developing and managing social media strategies for brands.

optimized_prerequisites.prerequisites_text: MARKETNG 300or declared in undergraduate Business Exchange program
